/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib CMakeFiles/anacapa.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o anacapa   -L/Users/douglascreel/usd/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/douglascreel/usd/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/open-image-denoise/2.4.1/lib libanacapa_lib.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libOpenImageIO.3.1.11.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libOpenImageIO_Util.3.1.11.dylib _deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a -lusd_usd -lusd_usdGeom -lusd_usdLux -lusd_usdShade -lusd_usdRender -lusd_tf -lusd_gf -lusd_vt -lusd_sdf -lusd_ar -lusd_plug /opt/homebrew/Cellar/open-image-denoise/2.4.1/lib/libOpenImageDenoise.2.4.1.dylib
